topic: Norway 4-1 Iraq: Haaland's brace on World Cup debut
subject: erling-haaland

hook.first_frame_text: 55 goals for Norway. Zero at a World Cup.
hook.spoken_hook: Fifty-five goals for Norway. Not one at a World Cup. Tonight changed that.

scenes.voiceover: 55 goals for Norway. Zero at a World Cup. Until tonight.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Floodlights in a dark stadium, moody blue atmosphere, bokeh effect, anticipation before a big match.

scenes.voiceover: 28 years Norway waited. Their superstar finally arrived.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Erling Haaland in Norway kit, dramatic stadium lighting, dark moody tones.

scenes.voiceover: 29 minutes. His first World Cup shot hit the net.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Crowd erupting in a stadium, gold and black atmosphere, silhouette celebration.

scenes.voiceover: Iraq fought back. Hussein leveled it.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Night stadium under floodlights, tense atmosphere, two silhouetted players jumping for a header.

scenes.voiceover: A gift. Haaland pounced. Header. Own goal. 4-1.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Gold confetti falling on a dark stadium, celebration atmosphere, Norway colors.

scenes.voiceover: Norway top on goal difference. Wide open.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Night stadium atmosphere as background for group standings table.

scenes.voiceover: Subscribe for your daily World Cup stories.

youtube_title: Norway 4-1 Iraq: Haaland's Brace on World Cup Debut | Group I | World Cup 2026
youtube_description:
Erling Haaland scored twice on his World Cup debut as Norway beat Iraq 4-1 in Boston. Norway return to the World Cup for the first time since 1998 — and their superstar striker made it a night to remember.

Scorers:
🇳🇴 Haaland 29', 43'
🇮🇶 Hussein 39'
🇳🇴 Østigård 76'
🇳🇴 OG 90+6'

Group I standings:
Norway — 3pts (+3)
France — 3pts (+2)
Senegal — 0pts (-2)
Iraq — 0pts (-3)

#WorldCup2026 #Norway #Haaland
instagram_caption:
55 goals for Norway. Zero at a World Cup. Until tonight. 🖤💛

Erling Haaland announced himself on the biggest stage with a brace as Norway beat Iraq 4-1 in Boston. 28 years of waiting, and the superstar delivered.

Who tops Group I — Norway or France? Screenshot this and prove me wrong in a week 👇
tiktok_caption: 55 goals. Zero World Cup minutes. Until tonight. Erling Haaland's World Cup debut was worth the wait 🖤💛 Norway 4-1 Iraq. Who tops Group I?
